response.justification: Bogdan is a talented engineer with strong software craftsmanship fundamentals, but he is fundamentally misaligned with the core requirements. His 15+ year career is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; C++ appears only episodically (National Instruments, audio synthesis projects, robotic systems). The position requires 5–10 years of professional C++ as a primary focus, ideally on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle expertise—neither of which is demonstrated. While his RIDE Capital experience touches fintech/investment, the role description lacks evidence of fixed-income or capital-markets domain depth. His recent trajectory (Shopify, Stripe, consumer platforms) diverges further from investment-banking and capital-markets systems work.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with proven expertise in CI/CD, testing (TDD), and DevOps infrastructure (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory)
Capital markets exposure through RIDE Capital and demonstrated ability to learn complex domains, plus Java development background
Excellent communication and teaching abilities demonstrated through workshops, conference talks, and open-source community contributions
concerns: C++ is not his primary language; career dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript (15+ years) and DLang with only episodic C++ projects (National Instruments, audio synthesis)
No demonstrated expertise with SQL Server or Oracle; recent production experience favors NoSQL (MongoDB) and general SQL/MySQL without relational database specialization

Capital markets exposure (RIDE Capital) is generalized fintech rather than fixed-income or investment-banking domain expertise; no evidence of fixed-income derivatives, derivatives pricing, or trading-system knowledge
